name: com.github.behrooz-arabzade.unity-input-syncer
description: Deterministic multiplayer input synchronization for Unity: lockstep steps, UTP and Socket.IO transports, optional UTP headless server and ECS helpers. Add com.itisnajim.socketiounity to your project manifest (Git URL or OpenUPM); it is not listed as a package dependency because UPM only accepts semver there.

samples.description: Driver MonoBehaviours, Tic Tac Toe sample, and server-simulation client code.
In-scene server setup and server-side simulation sample scripts.
